_meta.description: Temporary fallback data for CropWise AI chains. Refresh with: npx tsx scripts/fetch_mongodb_data.ts

schemes.description: A central sector scheme providing income support to all landholding farmers' families in the country to supplement their financial needs.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Financial benefit of ₹6,000 per year, transferred directly into the bank accounts of beneficiaries in three equal installments.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: All landholding farmer families with cultivable landholding in their names, excluding institutional landholders and high-income earners.

schemes.schemeName: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
schemes.description: The world's largest health insurance scheme fully financed by the government, providing a health cover for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for medical treatment in empaneled public and private hospitals.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: Vulnerable families identified based on the deprivation and occupational criteria of the Socio-Economic Caste Census (SECC) 2011.

schemes.description: A flagship housing scheme aimed at providing a pucca house with basic amenities to all houseless households living in kutcha and dilapidated houses in rural areas.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Financial assistance of ₹1.20 lakh in plains and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly states for house construction.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: Households without shelter, destitute, living on alms, manual scavengers, and primitive tribal groups.

schemes.description: A scheme aiming to safeguard the health of women and children by providing them with a clean cooking fuel (LPG).
schemes.benefitsDescription: Deposit-free LPG connection along with financial assistance of ₹1,600 per connection.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: Adult women belonging to BPL households, SC/ST households, PMAY beneficiaries, or Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) beneficiaries.

schemes.description: A National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, banking, savings, remittance, credit, insurance, and pension.
schemes.benefitsDescription: No minimum balance required, free RuPay debit card, and an inbuilt accident insurance cover of ₹2 lakh.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: Any Indian citizen aged 10 years and above who does not have an existing bank account.

schemes.description: A crop insurance scheme that integrates multiple stakeholders on a single platform to protect farmers against crop failure due to natural calamities.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Comprehensive insurance cover against failure of the crop, helping stabilize the income of farmers.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: All farmers growing notified crops in a notified area during the season who have insurable interest in the crop.

schemes.description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme meant for old age protection and social security of Unorganized Workers.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 after attaining the age of 60 years.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: Unorganized workers aged between 18 to 40 years with a monthly income of ₹15,000 or less.

schemes.description: A scheme to provide loans up to ₹10 lakh to the non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Collateral-free loans categorized into Shishu (up to ₹50K), Kishore (₹50K-₹5L), and Tarun (₹5L-₹10L) for income-generating activities.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: Any Indian citizen who has a business plan for a non-farm sector income-generating activity.

schemes.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
schemes.description: A one-year life insurance scheme renewable from year to year offering coverage for death due to any reason.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Life cover of ₹2 lakh payable to the nominee in case of the subscriber's death for a premium of ₹436 per annum.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: People in the age group of 18 to 50 years having a bank account who give their consent to join / enable auto-debit.

schemes.description: An accident insurance scheme offering accidental death and disability cover for death or disability on account of an accident.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Accidental death/full disability cover of ₹2 lakh and partial disability cover of ₹1 lakh for a premium of ₹20 per annum.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: People in the age group 18 to 70 years with a bank account who give their consent to join / enable auto-debit.

schemes.description: A special micro-credit facility to provide affordable loans to street vendors to resume their livelihoods.
schemes.benefitsDescription: Initial working capital loan of up to ₹10,000, with an interest subsidy of 7% per annum on regular repayment.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: Street vendors engaged in vending in urban areas as of or prior to March 24, 2020.

schemes.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
schemes.description: A food security welfare scheme designed to provide free food grains to the poorest citizens of India.
schemes.benefitsDescription: 5 kg of free wheat or rice per person per month, in addition to the regular subsidized quota.
schemes.eligibilityCriteria: Families belonging to the Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) and Priority Households (PHH) under the National Food Security Act.

diseases.organic_treatment: Neem oil spray (5 ml/litre), remove infected plant parts early.
diseases.chemical_treatment: Propiconazole (Tilt 25 EC) @ 0.1%, Mancozeb @ 0.2%. Spray at first sign.
diseases.prevention: Use resistant varieties (HD-2967, DBW-187), avoid late sowing.
Balanced nitrogen, avoid water stress, use resistant varieties (Pusa Basmati 1121).

symptoms: Dark brown spots with concentric rings on older leaves
diseases.chemical_treatment: Mancozeb @ 2g/litre or Chlorothalonil @ 2 g/litre every 7-10 days.
diseases.prevention: Crop rotation, remove crop debris, avoid overhead irrigation.
Early sowing, destroy crop stubble, use Bt cotton varieties.

symptoms: White fungal growth on undersides in humid conditions
diseases.prevention: Use certified seed, avoid waterlogging, hill up tubers properly.

cropRecommendations.advice: Start nursery preparation in May. Apply basal dose of fertiliser before transplanting.
Sow Wheat by Nov 15 for best yield. Use HD-3086 or DBW-222 for higher productivity.
Cash crops with quick returns. Use drip irrigation to save water in summer.
